18112/rush/37.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
18112/rush/37.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 1%.

18112/skill/100.name: Sol Janus
18112/skill/100.desc: Draws the power of Sol Erda's origin in two forms.

18112/skill/101.name: Eternal Light
18112/skill/101.desc:
[Passive Trigger Conditions] Additionally activates Eternal Light when using Spear of Lugh.\r\n
[Eternal Light] Manifests the blinding light of eternity to deal damage to enemies within an area. Has a reactivation cooldown.\r\n
[Radiant Sentinel] Eternal Light summons 1 Radiant Sentinel for a period of time when activated. The Radiant Sentinel finds and deals damage to the nearest enemy in range. If there is a boss within range, the sentinel will prioritize that boss.

18112/skill/102.name: Sentinel Rise
18112/skill/102.desc: Rallies the Shining Sentinels to fight against the darkness. Shining Sentinel summoned with this skill persist for a short period of time and disappear once their attack ends.

18112/skill/104.name: Eternal Guardian
18112/skill/104.desc: Summons the Sentinel Captain, materialized from divine power, and marks enemies with your Guardian's Gaze. Landing Roan attack skills a certain number of times while Guardian's Gaze is active will trigger Judgment of Light, which attacks the enemies marked by Guardian's Gaze.\nAttacks the boss with the highest Max HP first, and is unaffected by attack reflection.

18112/skill/106.name: Destruction of Roan
18112/skill/106.desc: Releases an explosive flash that destroys darkness, dealing continuous damage to enemies in a wide range. While casting, you are immune to knockback and debilitating status conditions. Unaffected by attack reflection.

18112/skill/108.name: Sol Hecate
18112/skill/108.desc: Coalesce Sol Erda drawn to the Adversary's determination into a guardian spirit.

18112/boost/300.name: Fruits of Mastery
18112/boost/300.desc: Increases EXP by 30% for 30 seconds for every 250 Combo Kills

18112/ultimate/500.name: SHINE Spear of Lugh
18112/ultimate/500.desc: Enhances Spear of Lugh.\nSummons the Sentinel Captain after using Spear of Lugh certain number of times, dealing additional attacks.

18112/ultimate/501.name: SHINE Fury of Roan/SHINE Sting of Roan
18112/ultimate/501.desc:
[SHINE Fury of Roan]: Sweep Roan's spear, which is strengthened by rage, to deal damage to enemies in front of you.
Can be used without casting while attacking with Spear of Lugh.

Not affected by cooldown reset effects.
[SHINE Sting of Roan]: Strike true with Roan's spear and deal damage to enemies in front of you.
Can be used without casting while attacking with Spear of Lugh.

Not affected by cooldown reset effects.

18112/origin/10000.name: Fall of Melin
18112/origin/10000.desc:
Slashes with the legendary Spear of Light that left a scar of darkness, dealing continuous damage to enemies in a large area. Then it immediately deals a final blow, dealing additional continuous damage to enemies in a large area.
#cLv. 10 - Ignore Defense: +20%
Lv. 20 - Boss Damage: +20%
Lv. 30 - Ignore Defense: +30%, Boss Damage: +30%#

18112/origin/10001.name: Radiant Spear
18112/origin/10001.desc:
Launches you high into the air, hurling a giant spear of condensed light to pierce enemies.

#cLv. 10 - Ignore Defense: +10%, Boss Damage: +10%
Lv. 20 - Ignore Defense: +10%, Boss Damage: +10%
Lv. 30 - Ignore Defense: +20%#

18212/ultimate/500.name: SHINE Ray/SHINE Antares
18212/ultimate/500.desc: [SHINE Ray]: Weaves starlight with the power of the Guide of the Stars and records Ray on the Stellagram.\n[SHINE Antares]: Complete the Antares fusion to summon a rabbit hole.

18212/ultimate/501.name: SHINE Boom/SHINE Algol/SHINE Formalhaut
18212/ultimate/501.desc:
[SHINE Boom]: Explodes with starlight that records Boom on the Stellagram.
[SHINE Algol]: Complete the Algol fusion to summon Algol as a lizard.
The lizard #ctracks and charges towards nearby enemies within a set area#.
The lizard targets bosses with high Max HP first and is unaffected by attack reflection.
[SHINE Fomalhaut]: Complete the Fomalhaut fusion to summon Fomalhaut as a horned conch for a set duration.
The conch #cspins around you and damages nearby enemies#. 4 will be summoned if the buff is active.
The conches are unaffected by attack reflection.

18212/origin/10000.name: Celestial Design
18212/origin/10000.desc: Summons the primordial starlight of the universe's birth, which bursts out in an explosion.

18212/origin/10001.name: Starlit Cosmos
18212/origin/10001.desc: Draw upon the light of blooming star flowers to awaken a newborn star.
